UserProgress.title: User Progressive Profile
UserProgress.description: Profile data and progress tracking for student, teacher, or admin users.

userId.description: The unique Firebase UID of the user.

role.description: The current role of the user.

displayName.description: Display name of the student or teacher.

classId.description: Optional classroom code or ID that the user coordinates or belongs to.

createdAt.description: Epoch timestamp of when the account was registered.

Classroom.title: Classroom
Classroom.description: A group created by a teacher to coordinate and track multiple students.

name.description: The custom name chosen by the teacher.

code.description: A unique 6-character code used by students to register into this class.

teacherId.description: The UID of the teacher presiding over the classroom.

teacherName.description: The current display name of the teacher.

studentIds.description: Array list of student UIDs registered/joined in this classroom.

createdAt.description: Epoch timestamp of when the classroom was initiated.

ExamRecord.title: Exam Score Record
ExamRecord.description: Performance tracking database from simulation exams.

studentName.description: The display name of the candidate.

module.description: The abbreviated IC3 GS6 module identifier.

correctCount.description: Quantity of correct answers in the simulator exam.

totalQuestions.description: Maximum question count for the module.

passed.description: Whether the exam scaled score was above standard threshold (700).

UploadedDocument.title: Uploaded Document/File
UploadedDocument.description: Metadata for files or documents uploaded by a user for study/reference purposes.

userId.description: The UID of the owning user.

size.description: The size of the uploaded document in bytes.

IC3Question.title: IC3 Certification Question
IC3Question.description: Custom questions created by administrators for specific IC3 Levels.

explanation.description: Explanation for why the option is correct.

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles indexed by their Firebase Authentication UID.

/exams/{examId}.description: Archived exam logs completed by students or candidates.

/documents/{documentId}.description: Metadata store for files uploaded by candidates or teachers for reference or certification verification.

/questions/{questionId}.description: Dynamic questions created by system administrators which supplement baseline static questions.
